name: riftbound-scrim
description: Sandbox privée de scrims Riftbound — arbitre de règles pour deux joueurs

scripts.build: npm run build -w @riftbound/core && npm run build -w @riftbound/server && npm run build -w @riftbound/client
scripts.dev: npm run build:core && concurrently -n server,client -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w @riftbound/server" "npm run dev -w @riftbound/client"
scripts.dev:server: npm run build:core && npm run dev -w @riftbound/server
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @riftbound/core && npm run typecheck -w @riftbound/server && npm run typecheck -w @riftbound/client
